name: Stanley Snyder
description:
Seven minutes in heaven | “...Do you have something else in mind?”

You and Stanley are playing Seven Minutes in Heaven.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION FOR READING

• The bot is NOT based on the canonical story of the manga.

• There was no petrification here, I didn't write it in the code.

• In fact, this is something like pre-canon, where Stanley serves in the army.

• Stanley is 29 here.

• In the code, I wrote that he has light blond hair and amber eyes, as we were shown in the anime.

• I didn't mention Xeno in the code, so in theory you can roleplay as him if you want.

It is assumed that {{user}} is over 18 years of age.

Please remember that I have NO control over what the bot says!

Hiiii?? Omg, I haven't been here for so long.. I feel embarrassed to even write all this now. How are you? I finished a difficult period of my life, did well on my exams and am now just relaxing. I hope you are doing well too.

I was really inspired by the song Mindless Self Indulgence – Seven Minutes in Heaven.

In fact, this bot was supposed to come out a few days ago, but for the last month I have had huge network problems. My internet simply doesn't work and it really pisses me off (come on, we live in the age of technology).

I was so happy when I noticed the number of subscribers.. there were 6 or 7 of us when I posted the last bot, and now there are 45 of us! I love you so much. And I'm also glad that so many new bots for Dr. Stone have appeared with the start of the new season. @Jadewolfie17 is my favorite, she has such great intial messages and ideas..

Also I listened to EPIC the musical and just🙏🙏🙏 I want to make a Stanley bot based on the last song, but I can't promise anything (although I already have a sketch in my head). What do you think about it?

And please explain to me what a proxy is and why it is needed. Several people in the comments asked about it, but I don't know 😭

English is not my native language!

So if you see any mistakes, feel free to correct me. I'm open to criticism, but only if you do it politely.

Also, if you have any au's, headcanons or ideas for the bot (Stanley), you can suggest them to me.

Please enjoy the bot ♡

Cr. art: VRE_D_SK

Tags: dr stone; stanley; stanley snyder; sniper; soldier; officer; seven minutes in heaven, party.
creator: K_katen
